subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have found the Mother Book to possess a tongue that speaketh the truth and summoneth the people unto God, the Lord of the worlds. Blessed be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا وجدنا لام الکتاب لسانا ینطق بالحق و یدع الناس الی الله رب العالمین طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
